commands.author: samson1357924

target.title: fix(cron): add Authorization header to provider preflight probe
target.body:
## Summary

The cron job preflight check sends `GET {baseUrl}/models` to verify local provider connectivity before running a job, but was doing so **without an Authorization header**. For providers behind auth middleware (LiteLLM, vLLM, etc.), this generates spurious 401 errors on every cron run.

## Root Cause

`model-preflight.runtime.ts` -> `probeLocalProviderEndpoint()` called `fetchWithSsrFGuard` with `init: { method: "GET" }` - no auth header.

## Fix

**Integrated `resolveApiKeyForProvider`** from the shared SDK auth runtime (`plugin-sdk/provider-auth-runtime.ts`) for full credential chain resolution. This reuses the complete credential chain (config -> auth profiles -> env vars -> plugin hooks -> SecretRef) instead of sending probes without authentication.

### What changed

- `model-preflight.runtime.ts`: Added `resolveApiKeyForProvider` import; added `agentDir`/`workspaceDir` params; 2-tier auth: `request.auth.token` override -> `resolveApiKeyForProvider`; OAuth exclusion; auth leak protection via error redaction; added `isNonSecretApiKeyMarker` guard to prevent sentinel markers from being sent as Bearer tokens; guarded empty-string `request.auth.token` to prevent bare `Authorization: Bearer` header
- `run.ts`: Passes `agentDir` and `workspaceDir` to the preflight call
- `model-preflight.runtime.test.ts`: Expanded from 4 to 13 tests covering all auth paths + marker filtering

### Auth precedence

1. `request.auth.token` (explicit config override, `authorization-bearer` mode, non-empty after trim) - highest
2. `resolveApiKeyForProvider` - full credential chain from the shared SDK runtime (with `isNonSecretApiKeyMarker` guard)
3. No auth (OAuth tokens excluded; missing credentials non-fatal; sentinel markers like `custom-local`, `ollama-local`, env-var names filtered out)

### Security

- `Authorization: Bearer <key>` values are **redacted** from error messages via regex
- OAuth tokens are never sent to reachability probes
- SSRF protection via hostname allowlist + private network scoping
- Non-secret sentinel markers (`custom-local`, `ollama-local`, `secretref-managed`, env-var name references, etc.) are never sent as Bearer tokens
- Empty-string or whitespace-only `request.auth.token` values fall through to the credential chain (prevents bare `Authorization: Bearer` header)

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Cron job preflight GET /models to local LiteLLM proxy returns 401 because no Authorization header is sent, causing "No api key passed in" errors on every cron run.

- **Real environment tested:** OpenClaw 2026.5.18 (npm install, Oracle VPS, Ubuntu 24.04, Node.js v24.15.0). LiteLLM proxy at http://127.0.0.1:4000 configured in openclaw.json. Auth method: LITELLM_API_KEY environment variable.

- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** (1) Applied the patch to dist/model-preflight.runtime-*.js on the running OpenClaw installation. (2) Waited for the next scheduled cron job run to trigger the preflight probe. (3) Monitored LiteLLM proxy logs via `pm2 logs litellm-proxy`. (4) Monitored OpenClaw gateway logs for cron job execution.

- **Evidence after fix:**

  **Before — no auth header, cron preflight triggers 401:**

  LiteLLM proxy log showing the failed preflight probe:
  ```text
  17:30:05 LiteLLM Proxy:ERROR - Exception occured - No api key passed in.
  Requester IP Address:127.0.0.1
  127.0.0.1:58244 - "GET /models HTTP/1.1" 401 Unauthorized
  127.0.0.1:50768 - "POST /chat/completions HTTP/1.1" 200 OK
  ```

  Normal inference calls (POST /chat/completions) succeed because they carry the Authorization header - only the preflight probe was missing it.

  **After — auth header sent, preflight succeeds:**

  LiteLLM proxy log showing the successful preflight probe:
  ```text
  127.0.0.1:45914 - "GET /models HTTP/1.1" 200 OK
  127.0.0.1:49934 - "POST /chat/completions HTTP/1.1" 200 OK
  ```

- **Observed result after fix:** GET /models response changed from **401 Unauthorized** to **200 OK**. No more "No api key passed in" errors in LiteLLM proxy logs. Cron preflight cache populates correctly. Normal inference calls continue to work as before - unchanged.

- **What was not tested:** Non-default cron agent directories. SecretRef-based auth. Authless providers like Ollama (should be unaffected). OAuth/request-header auth profiles. Bundled plugin marker filtering (covered by isNonSecretApiKeyMarker unit tests).

## CI Status

Rebased to latest upstream/main. All CI failures are pre-existing flakes in unrelated test areas (resolve-openclaw-ref GITHUB_OUTPUT env var issue, bench-gateway-restart race, test-projects stale file list, cli-runner.spawn ENOENT). None caused by the PR changes.

## Changes

4 files changed:
- `src/cron/isolated-agent/model-preflight.runtime.ts` - auth refactor + marker filter + empty-string guard
- `src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts` - scope passthrough
- `src/cron/isolated-agent/model-preflight.runtime.test.ts` - 13 tests (auth + markers)

Closes #83648
